_instructions: Copy this file to client-intake.json and fill in the fields. client-intake.json is gitignored. Run `npm run scan` first, then fill in narrative fields and run `npm run rebuild-report` to regenerate HTML without re-scanning.
_narrative_note: Fill these in after the stakeholder interview, then run `npm run rebuild-report`.
executiveSummary: Acme Corp has a mature Salesforce implementation with strong process coverage across Service Cloud. The assessment identified data quality gaps in Contact records and an under-developed Knowledge base as the two blockers preventing a reliable Agentforce deployment. Both are addressable within a 12-week sprint.

domainSummaries.Data quality & completeness: Contact email completion has improved over the last 12 months but 28% of records remain missing email addresses, largely from a legacy import in 2021. The team is aware and a bulk enrichment project is in the backlog.
domainSummaries.Automation health & conflicts: The org has 47 active flows with good coverage across the lead-to-case lifecycle. 6 flows are missing fault paths — these were built before fault connectors were standard practice and can be fixed in a single admin sprint.
domainSummaries.Security & permission model: The Security Health Check endpoint is not available on this org edition. On the client's production org this will return live data. The admin confirmed MFA is enforced org-wide.
domainSummaries.Knowledge base & grounding: The knowledge base has 12 published articles covering billing queries. The top case reasons — returns, delivery issues, and product faults — have no corresponding articles. This is the primary gap to close before the Agentforce pilot.
domainSummaries.Metadata & technical debt: 340 unused custom fields accumulated from a 2019 CPQ implementation that was subsequently retired. The admin team has a scheduled clean-up in Q3 2026 — this work is already planned and does not require additional effort from the roadmap.
domainSummaries.User adoption & process alignment: Login rate is high at 92% — all service reps are actively using the platform daily. Task logging is below the industry median, which the service manager confirmed is by design: a third-party telephony integration logs call outcomes directly to Case, not Task.
domainSummaries.Platform limits & API headroom: API usage is at 4% of the daily limit. Data storage is at 12%. There is significant headroom to absorb the additional API calls and storage that Agentforce agents will generate at full deployment scale.

_fees_note: Fill these in after negotiation. Defaults are Yukti Global list prices. Set low = high for a fixed fee; leave null to use the default range.
